response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and PostgreSQL-like systems (MongoDB, SQL), along with a strong background in scalable architectures, testing, and DevOps. His work in renewable energy-adjacent projects (GISCollective) and energy-related automation (Optilyz) aligns well with the role. While his seniority exceeds entry-level, his pragmatic approach and learning agility justify advancing him to interview.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly matching role requirements
Proven track record in scalable systems (handling millions of requests, Kubernetes, CI/CD) and pragmatic architecture decisions
Relevant industry exposure in energy/consulting workflows (GISCollective, Optilyz) and automation tools
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (15+ years of senior experience), may seek higher compensation or responsibilities
Limited direct PostgreSQL experience (focused on MongoDB/SQL), though relational database knowledge is present
German language skills are basic, which may impact on-site collaboration in Berlin
